block.header: sakasima ni kitana ki yatukwo naka maro i itupari kadam ye ru kokoro wo moti te ikusa wo okosi mikadwo wo katabuke ugwoka sa mu to site suzu osite wo ubapi mata mikadwo no kurawi wo kaswopi te saki ni sute kirapi tamapi te si punado ga ani sipo yaki wo mikadwo no kurawi ni pa sadame tu to ipi te tukasa no osite wo osi te ame no sita no kuni guni ni pumi wo akati te tuge sira sime mata ipa ku ima no opo mikoto wo uke moti wi yo saki ni itupari te opo mikoto to ipi te aru koto wo uke moti wi ru koto e zu are to ipi te moro pito no kokoro wo madwopasi mi tu no seki ni tukapi wo yari te pisoka ni seki wo todi pito tu puta tu no kuni ni ikusa yoboro wo kopi ikusa okosa simu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,8@道祖我兄塩焼乎皇位仁方定止云天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,10@天下乃諸国仁書乎散天告知之米,*

sentence.transcription: sakasima ni kitana ki
yatukwo naka maro i itupari kadam ye ru
kokoro wo moti te
ikusa wo okosi
mikadwo wo katabuke ugwoka sa mu to site
suzu osite wo ubapi
mata mikadwo no kurawi wo kaswopi te
saki ni sute kirapi tamapi te si

sentence.kanji: 道祖我兄塩焼乎皇位仁方定止云天
sentence.transcription: punado ga ani sipo yaki wo mikadwo no kurawi ni pa sadame tu to ipi te
tukasa no osite wo osi te

sentence.kanji: 天下乃諸国仁書乎散天告知之米
sentence.transcription: ame no sita no kuni guni ni pumi wo akati te tuge sira sime
mata ipa ku
ima no opo mikoto wo uke moti wi yo
saki ni itupari te
opo mikoto to
ipi te aru
koto wo uke moti wi ru
koto e zu are to ipi te
moro pito no kokoro wo madwopasi
mi tu no seki ni tukapi wo yari te
pisoka ni seki wo todi
pito tu puta tu no kuni ni ikusa yoboro wo kopi
ikusa okosa simu

block.header: ko wo mi ru ni naka maro ga kokoro no sakasima ni asi ki sama pa siri nu

sentence.transcription: ko wo mi ru ni
naka maro ga kokoro no sakasima ni asi ki
sama pa siri nu

block.header: sika areba saki ni si ga mawosi si koto pa koto goto ni kada mi peturapi te ari kyeri

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,2@事方毎事仁姧美謟天在家利,*

sentence.transcription: sika areba
saki ni si ga mawosi si

sentence.kanji: 事方毎事仁姧美謟天在家利
sentence.transcription: koto pa koto goto ni kada mi peturapi te ari kyeri

block.header: ko wo omope ba tada onore pito ri nomwi mikadwo no ikipopi wo e te tamapi mono tumi no koto wo pitaburu ni ono ga posi ki manima ni okonapa mu to omopi te ani toyo nari no asomi wo itupari te sikodi mawosi tamap ye ru ni yori te kurawi wo sirizoke tamapite ko no tosi no tosi goro ari tu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,1@唯己独乃未朝庭乃勢力乎得天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,4@兄豊成朝臣乎詐天讒治奏賜流尔依天,*

sentence.transcription: ko wo omope ba

sentence.kanji: 唯己独乃未朝庭乃勢力乎得天
sentence.transcription: tada onore pito ri nomwi mikadwo no ikipopi wo e te
tamapi mono tumi no koto wo pitaburu ni ono ga posi ki
manima ni okonapa mu to omopi te

sentence.kanji: 兄豊成朝臣乎詐天讒治奏賜流尔依天
sentence.transcription: ani toyo nari no asomi wo itupari te sikodi mawosi tamap ye ru ni yori te
kurawi wo sirizoke tamapite
ko no tosi no tosi goro ari tu

block.header: sikaredomo ima pa akiraka ni naka maro ga itupari ni ari kyeri to siri te moto no opo mapye tu kimi no kurawi ni tukape matura simuru koto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,1@今方明仁仲末呂可詐仁在家利止知天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,2@本乃大臣乃位仁仕奉之武流,*

sentence.transcription: sikaredomo

sentence.kanji: 今方明仁仲末呂可詐仁在家利止知天
sentence.transcription: ima pa akiraka ni naka maro ga itupari ni ari kyeri to siri te

sentence.kanji: 本乃大臣乃位仁仕奉之武流
sentence.transcription: moto no opo mapye tu kimi no kurawi ni tukape matura simuru
koto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku asi ku kadamasi ki yatukwo no maturi goto no moto wo tori te mawosi tamapu koto wo moti te udi udi no udi bito domo wo mo susume tukapasu koto kotowari no goto mo ara zu ari tu

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-GEN,NP,1@奴乃政乃柄乎執天奏多末不,*
CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,3@諸氏氏人等乎毛進都可方湏,*
CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,NP,4@己止理乃如毛不在阿利都,*

sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapa ku asi ku kadamasi ki

sentence.kanji: 奴乃政乃柄乎執天奏多末不
sentence.transcription: yatukwo no maturi goto no moto wo tori te mawosi tamapu
koto wo moti te

sentence.kanji: 諸氏氏人等乎毛進都可方湏
sentence.transcription: udi udi no udi bito domo wo mo susume tukapasu

sentence.kanji: 己止理乃如毛不在阿利都
sentence.transcription: koto kotowari no goto mo ara zu ari tu

block.header: koko wo moti te ima yori noti pa tukape matu ra mu sama no manima ni susume moti wi tamapa mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP,2@相乃末仁末仁進用賜武,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo moti te
ima yori noti pa tukape matu ra mu

sentence.kanji: 相乃末仁末仁進用賜武
sentence.transcription: sama no manima ni susume moti wi tamapa mu

block.header: sikaru ni si ga mawosi siku ko no zenzi no piru yworu mikadwo wo mamori tukape maturu wo mi ru ni topo tu oya no opo mapye tu kimi to site tukape maturi si kurawi na wo tuga mu to omopi te aru pito nari to ipi te sirizoke tamapye to mawosi sikadomo ko no zenzi no okonapi wo miru ni itari te kiywo si

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@此禅師乃昼夜朝庭乎護仕奉乎見流仁,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,7@退賜止奏之可止毛此禅師乃行乎見尔至天浄之,*

sentence.transcription: sikaru ni
si ga mawosi siku

sentence.kanji: 此禅師乃昼夜朝庭乎護仕奉乎見流仁
sentence.transcription: ko no zenzi no piru yworu mikadwo wo mamori tukape maturu wo mi ru ni

sentence.kanji: 先祖乃大臣止之天仕奉之
sentence.transcription: topo tu oya no opo mapye tu kimi to site tukape maturi si
kurawi na wo tuga mu to
omopi te aru
pito nari to ipi te

sentence.kanji: 退賜止奏之可止毛此禅師乃行乎見尔至天浄之
sentence.transcription: sirizoke tamapye to mawosi sikadomo ko no zenzi no okonapi wo miru ni itari te kiywo si

block.header: potoke no mi nori wo tugi pirome mu to omoposi masi ware wo mo miti biki mamori masu ono ga si wo ya ta yasu ku sirizoke matura mu to omopi te ari tu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,0@仏乃御法乎継隆武止念行末之,*

sentence.kanji: 仏乃御法乎継隆武止念行末之
sentence.transcription: potoke no mi nori wo tugi pirome mu to omoposi masi
ware wo mo miti biki mamori masu
ono ga si wo ya ta yasu ku
sirizoke matura mu to
omopi te ari tu

block.header: sikaru ni ware pa kami wo sorite potoke no mi kyesa wo ki te are domo ame no sita no maturi goto wo okonapa zu aru koto e zu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,2@仏乃御袈裟乎服天在止毛,*

sentence.transcription: sikaru ni
ware pa kami wo sorite

sentence.kanji: 仏乃御袈裟乎服天在止毛
sentence.transcription: potoke no mi kyesa wo ki te are domo
ame no sita no maturi goto wo okonapa zu aru
koto e zu

block.header: potoke mo kyau ni nori tamapaku kokuwau i wau wi ni imasu toki pa bosati no zyaukai wo uke yo to nori tamapi te ari

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@仏毛経仁勅久国王伊王位仁坐,*
IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP-TOP,NP,1@時方菩薩乃浄戒乎受与止,*

sentence.kanji: 仏毛経仁勅久国王伊王位仁坐
sentence.transcription: potoke mo kyau ni nori tamapaku kokuwau i wau wi ni imasu

sentence.kanji: 時方菩薩乃浄戒乎受与止
sentence.transcription: toki pa bosati no zyaukai wo uke yo to
nori tamapi te ari

block.header: kore ni yori te omo peba ipye de si te mo maturi goto wo okonapu ni ani saparu be ki mono ni pa ara zu

sentence.transcription: kore ni yori te omo peba
ipye de si te mo
maturi goto wo okonapu ni ani saparu be ki
mono ni pa ara zu

block.header: kare koko wo moti te mikadwo no ipye de site imasu yo ni pa ipye de site aru be si to omopi te negapi masu kurawi ni pa ara nedomo ko no dau kyau zenzi wo daizin zenzi to kurawi pa saduke maturu koto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,2@世仁方出家之天在大臣毛在,*

sentence.transcription: kare koko wo moti te
mikadwo no ipye de site imasu

sentence.kanji: 世仁方出家之天在大臣毛在
sentence.transcription: yo ni pa ipye de site aru
be si to omopi te
negapi masu
kurawi ni pa ara nedomo

sentence.kanji: 此道鏡禅師乎大臣禅師止
sentence.transcription: ko no dau kyau zenzi wo daizin zenzi to
kurawi pa saduke maturu
koto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku ame no sita no pito tare so kimi no yatukwo ni ara zu ara mu

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,0@復勅久天下乃人誰曾君乃臣仁不在安良武,*

sentence.kanji: 復勅久天下乃人誰曾君乃臣仁不在安良武
sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapaku ame no sita no pito tare so kimi no yatukwo ni ara zu ara mu

block.header: kokoro kiywo ku site tukape matu ra mu kore si makoto no wa ga yatukwo ni pa ara mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,1@此之実能朕臣仁方在武,*

sentence.transcription: kokoro kiywo ku site tukape matu ra mu

sentence.kanji: 此之実能朕臣仁方在武
sentence.transcription: kore si makoto no wa ga yatukwo ni pa ara mu

block.header: sore pito to site ono ga topo tu oya no na wo okosi tugi pirome mu to omopa zu aru pa ara zu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,1@己我先祖乃名乎興継比呂米武,*

sentence.transcription: sore pito to site

sentence.kanji: 己我先祖乃名乎興継比呂米武
sentence.transcription: ono ga topo tu oya no na wo okosi tugi pirome mu
to omopa zu aru pa ara zu

block.header: koko wo moti te aka ku kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te tukape matura mu woba udi udi no kadwo pa tati tamapa zu wosame tamapa mu to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ARG,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP,NP,2@心以天仕奉乎方氏氏門方絶多末方湏,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo moti te
aka ku kiywo ki

sentence.kanji: 心以天仕奉乎方氏氏門方絶多末方湏
sentence.transcription: kokoro wo moti te tukape matura mu woba udi udi no kadwo pa tati tamapa zu
wosame tamapa mu to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata nori tamapaku tukape maturu sama ni sitagapi te kagapuri kurawi age tamapi wosame tamapa ku to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapaku tukape maturu
sama ni sitagapi te
kagapuri kurawi age tamapi
wosame tamapa ku to noritamapu
